label: Baby play
description: Defines a play activity available to baby pawns. The workerClass implements eligibility checks and issues the jobDef when the activity is triggered.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# BabyPlayGiver subclass that implements eligibility checks and issues the job for this play activity.

jobDef.label: Job def
jobDef.description: JobDef the worker issues when this play activity is triggered.

basic-baby-play.label: Basic baby play
basic-baby-play.description: Baby play activity with a worker class and job.
